level1.name: loneliness.n.01
level1.definition: the state of being alone in solitary isolation

level1.name: data.n.01
level1.definition: a collection of facts from which conclusions may be drawn

level1.name: target.n.01
level1.definition: a reference point to shoot at

level1.name: by.r.01
level1.definition: so as to pass a given point

level1.name: arsenic.n.02
level1.definition: a very poisonous metallic element that has three allotropic forms; arsenic and arsenic compounds are used as herbicides and insecticides and various alloys; found in arsenopyrite and orpiment and realgar

level1.name: approach.n.01
level1.definition: ideas or actions intended to deal with a problem or situation

level1.name: healthcare.n.01
level1.definition: the preservation of mental and physical health by preventing or treating illness through services offered by the health profession

level1.name: information_technology.n.01
level1.definition: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information

level1.name: remains.n.01
level1.definition: any object that is left unused or still extant

level1.name: understand.v.01
level1.definition: know and comprehend the nature or meaning of

level1.name: rewrite.v.01
level1.definition: write differently; alter the writing of

level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level2.name: isolation.n.01
level2.definition: a state of separation between persons or groups

level2.name: matter.n.06
level2.definition: written works (especially in books or magazines)

level2.name: collection.n.01
level2.definition: several things grouped together or considered as a whole

level2.name: reference_point.n.01
level2.definition: an indicator that orients you generally

level2.name: chemical_element.n.01
level2.definition: any of the more than 100 known substances (of which 92 occur naturally) that cannot be separated into simpler substances and that singly or in combination constitute all matter

level2.name: organism.n.01
level2.definition: a living thing that has (or can develop) the ability to act or function independently

level2.name: conceptualization.n.01
level2.definition: inventing or contriving an idea or explanation and formulating it mentally

level2.name: care.n.01
level2.definition: the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

level2.name: engineering.n.02
level2.definition: the discipline dealing with the art or science of applying scientific knowledge to practical problems

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level3.name: writing.n.02
level3.definition: the work of a writer; anything expressed in letters of the alphabet (especially when considered from the point of view of style and effect)

level3.name: substance.n.01
level3.definition: the real physical matter of which a person or thing consists

level3.name: creating_by_mental_acts.n.01
level3.definition: the act of creating something by thinking

level3.name: work.n.01
level3.definition: activity directed toward making or doing something

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level4.name: written_communication.n.01
level4.definition: communication by means of written symbols (either printed or handwritten)

level4.name: signal.n.01
level4.definition: any nonverbal action or gesture that encodes a message

level4.name: part.n.01
level4.definition: something determined in relation to something that includes it

level4.name: whole.n.02
level4.definition: an assemblage of parts that is regarded as a single entity

level4.name: knowledge_domain.n.01
level4.definition: the content of a particular field of knowledge

level4.name: interact.v.01
level4.definition: act together or towards others or with others

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

top_concepts.name: loneliness.n.01
top_concepts.definition: the state of being alone in solitary isolation

top_concepts.name: isolation.n.01
top_concepts.definition: a state of separation between persons or groups
